speaker: MATT
raw_text: Seven points of acid, got it. As it slams, it begins to burn the back of the skin. You watch a bit of steam rise off of its shoulder. It definitely is wounding the creature. This large, swollen troll is still making a break. I need everyone to roll initiative now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Essentially, yeah. You guys all spin and watch this happening. Kiri's over by the edge of the tree with you, and Caleb, where were you?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Towards the back of the group, never near the front.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You would have probably been over here, near Nott.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I fired a shot that missed.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Magic Missile, level two, four darts, total of 16 force damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARK
preceding_turns.text: Reflex save-- Dexterity. Dexterity saving throw for the Acid Splash.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The troll spins and goes running with Febron going (screaming) in its grasp, it starts lumbering, leaping from tree to tree. Its legs, while it has this bulbous, swollen midsection, these thin frog-like legs are giving these fairly decent leaps from section to section, its other arm grasping onto the trees as it runs. You can see this is definitely its home terrain. As these magic missiles swarm out and slam into its body, with each impact, that green ichor sprays across Febron, and it starts to burn into his skin. He's (screaming).

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is he unconscious? Is he done? Is that it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I rolled 2d8. I rolled eight on each of them. That was the reaction there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARK
preceding_turns.text: Dexterity saving throw for the Acid Splash as well, if you don't mind.
